doneWhen: Prompt tested across 10 queries. 90% relevance score.

memory: Catches SQL injection that human reviewers miss.

title: Code review prompt
doneWhen: Blind test on 5 PRs: catches >=80% of seeded bugs.
purpose: Few-shot prompt that catches security bugs, logic errors, and performance issues in pull requests.

title: SQL query optimizer prompt
memory: Postgres EXPLAIN ANALYZE format needed in system prompt.
Index suggestions work but sometimes miss partial indexes.
doneWhen: 10 production queries improved: >=2x speedup on 7/10.
purpose: Takes a SQL query and schema, suggests indexes and rewrites. Works on Postgres, MySQL, and SQLite.

title: Safety classifier eval
memory: Current F1 0.78. False negatives on subtle toxicity.
Adding context about the conversation helps.
doneWhen: F1 > 0.85, false-positive rate < 5%.
purpose: Evaluate a prompt-based safety classifier against 500 red-team prompts. Measure precision, recall, false-positive rate.

title: Model comparison: GPT-4o vs Claude Opus
memory: Need to standardize temperature at 0 for fair comparison.

memory: Urgency classifier confuses 'billing' and 'account-access' categories.

title: Support ticket triage chain
doneWhen: Live on 100 tickets: >=85% correctly classified, <5% escalation errors.
purpose: Chain: ticket → classify urgency → find similar → draft response → queue for human review. Reduces support engineer time by 60%.

title: Design system audit prompt
doneWhen: Audited 3 projects: >=90% of human-caught issues also caught by prompt.
purpose: Prompt that audits a codebase against a design system: checks color tokens, spacing consistency, typography scale, component reuse. Outputs a prioritized fix list.
